name: Jenn / educator style
style: Confident South African nail educator. Warm, direct, knowledgeable.
voiceNote: Speaks clearly and simply. Uses 'nail tech' not 'nail technician'.
flowAvatarPromptHint: A South African woman in her 30s, professional but approachable, seated at a nail station, natural makeup, wearing a black apron

name: AI nail tech
style: Professional salon nail tech with a calm, capable presence.
voiceNote: Speaks like a working nail tech explaining one useful lesson.
flowAvatarPromptHint: A professional South African nail tech in salon wear, friendly expression, hands near a clean nail desk

name: AI customer
style: Relatable customer who explains the problem in simple language.
voiceNote: Speaks naturally and clearly, with honest everyday wording.
flowAvatarPromptHint: A South African customer in her late 20s, relaxed and friendly, sitting near a neat nail station

name: Beginner student
style: New nail tech who wants confidence without feeling judged.
voiceNote: Speaks with simple, curious, practical wording.
flowAvatarPromptHint: A beginner South African nail student, focused and hopeful, practising at a tidy training table
